expectations.text: Reads /.ai-context and module-context.md before writing any code
expectations.evidence: Response begins immediately with '## Overview of the layers we will touch' and 'Step 1 — ORM Entity'. No mention of reading .ai-context, module-context.md, or any project context files before writing code.

expectations.text: Writes test first (TDD) before implementing the entity
expectations.evidence: Step 1 creates the ORM Entity, Step 3 creates DTOs, Steps 4-5 create the repository, Steps 6-8 create API schemas and router. Tests don't appear until Step 12 — well after all implementation.

expectations.text: Entity extends BaseEntity and includes winery_id
expectations.evidence: class FermentationNote(BaseEntity): — extends BaseEntity ✅. However, columns defined are only `fermentation_id`, `created_by_user_id`, `note_text`, `is_deleted`. No `winery_id` column on the entity.
from src.modules.fermentation.src.domain.entities.fermentation_note import FermentationNote (used consistently throughout all files)
## Step 11 — Alembic migration: Create `alembic/versions/008_create_fermentation_notes.py` with full upgrade()/downgrade() creating the fermentation_notes table.

expectations.text: Tells user to update module-context.md test count and component list
expectations.evidence: No mention of module-context.md anywhere in the response. The guide ends at Step 13 (API contract summary) with no instruction to update any context or documentation files.
